description: Send a colorful Easter email to your subscribers with our Easter Comics email template! Designer Galina Grahovska created this fun email, using colorful Easter fonts and doodles to make a playful way for you to promote your Easter sales. Customize this celebration email with your own discounts and then send the email to Mailchimp, Klaviyo, Constant Contact, Hubspot, Active Campaign, or one of the other available connectors. This seasonal promotion email is available to all BEE users at no cost and is a fantastic way to promote your brand this Easter season.

designer.description:
I have gained experience and skills in communications and organization of the work while I was hired in E.Miroglio EAD. I’ve also got excellent French as I was living in France for a few years.

About an year ago, I’ve started designing interfaces and that’s definitely what I was looking for my whole life. I’m using Adobe Photoshop to design websites, emails and mobile apps. I also create prototypes in InVision to make the whole process from the start to the finish much easier.
